verse_text: God led Him out of Egypt, And He has the glorious appearance of a unicorn. He shall consume the nations of his enemies And deprive them of their strength. He shall shoot the enemy with His missiles.

links.context: [[NUM.24:2]], [[NUM.24:3]], [[NUM.24:5]]-9, 17, 18: This passage is read at Vespers of the Feast of the Nativity of the Lord.
